properties.name: control-type
properties.description: Whether the menu item should behave as a checkbox or radio button.

properties.name: check-appearance
properties.description: Sets the appearance of the check element

properties.name: check-trailing
properties.description: Sets the check element to appear at the end of the Menu Item

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: Sets the connotation that appears when checked

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`s

properties.name: text-secondary
properties.description: Give more context to the text

events.name: expanded-change
events.description: Fired when the expanded state changes.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the item is triggered. Does not fire when a submenu is collapsed or expanded.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: For additional elements at the start of the Menu Item

slots.name: trailing-meta
slots.description: For additional elements at the end of the Menu Item
